description: Comprehensive MCP Server Configuration for Full-Stack AI Development
_comment: Production-ready MCP environment with debugging, analysis, and monitoring capabilities

microsoft-docs.description: Official Microsoft/Azure documentation access via HTTP endpoint
microsoft-docs._purpose: Provides real-time access to Microsoft Learn documentation for development assistance

context7.description: Real-time documentation and code examples for any library/framework
context7._purpose: Retrieves up-to-date documentation and usage examples for coding assistance

seq-thinking.description: Enhanced reasoning capabilities for complex problem solving
seq-thinking._purpose: Provides step-by-step analytical thinking process for complex tasks and debugging

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph for AI memory across sessions
memory._purpose: Maintains context, entities, and relationships between development sessions

nuget-search.description: NuGet package search and .NET dependency management
nuget-search._purpose: Package discovery, version checking, and dependency resolution for .NET projects

mssql-mcp.description: Local SQL Server database operations and management
mssql-mcp._purpose: Database operations, queries, schema management, and data analysis

csMcp.description: Roslyn-based AI static code analysis tool
csMcp._purpose: Provides comprehensive C# code analysis, syntax inspection, semantic analysis, and code quality assessment using Roslyn compiler services

_notes: All custom MCP servers (dbgMcp, csMcp, mcpLogProbe) are built with .NET and support extended timeout for complex operations
Environment variables like ${McpServers} are resolved at runtime for portable paths
Custom servers focus on full-stack development: debugging, analysis, and monitoring
Blazor/MAUI applications supported through EvalHub integration in mcpLogProbe
